ground_truth_text: Contracted research may entail confidentiality and restriction on publication.
source_document: AA-4-1-1 Academic Integrity in Research and Publication rev18Mar2022.pdf

ground_truth_text: Their educational visas may also be cancelled.

(2) Continuing full-time postgraduate (PG) students (Master, Doctor and Diploma), i.e., those who completed at least one semester/term, will be invoiced for the applicable registration, tuition, and other fees each semester/term from the second semester/term onwards, which must be paid in advance and/or fully paid before each semester/term starts, otherwise they will not be allowed to register.
Writing-off of doubtful accounts will be requested by OFIN and have to be approved by the President, or their VP designate.
Sponsors must be invoiced for outstanding dues and requested to send AIT a promissory note detailing their payment dates.
(20) Overdue accounts shall be reviewed periodically, and follow-up collections shall be initiated.
(10) Additional payments for audited and repeated courses, as well as beyond the minimum 3 credits for part-time students must be paid before mid semester examinations.
FB-6-1-1: CREDIT POLICY notice from the Accommodation Unit, and the tenant is required to vacate the unit within thirty (30) days upon receipt of the notice.
Students shall not disturb fellow students in the residential areas.
Exceptions to this may only be given to those whose exchange program is less than two months.
